headline: A $4.2M Sale, 46% Stake Cut: What TransDigm Co-COO Joel Reiss's Latest Transaction Means for Investors
summary: Reiss exercised options at $284.97 and liquidated shares at $1,216.21, capturing ~$3.2M in gains as TDG stock declined 22% over the past year.
